old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4.3","title":"App: Mesh Trivia - Real-time crowd voting","description":"## Overview

Gateway pushes question to all 500 nodes. Everyone votes. Results appear live on big screen.

## Features

### Question types
- Multiple choice (A/B/C/D)
- Yes/No/Maybe
- Numeric scale (1-5)
- Free text (for word clouds)

### Flow
1. Operator submits question via web UI
2. Gateway broadcasts to all nodes
3. E-ink displays question + options
4. User presses button (A=1 press, B=2 press, etc.)
5. Node sends vote to gateway
6. Big screen shows live bar chart filling up

### Gamification
- Fastest correct answer wins
- Streak bonuses
- Leaderboard (opt-in, by node name)

### Use cases
- "Which talk was best?"
- "Where should the afterparty be?"
- "Tabs or spaces?"
- "Is this thing actually working?" (meta)

## Protocol

### Gateway → All nodes (multicast)
```json
{"type": "question", "id": 42, "text": "Tabs or spaces?", "options": ["Tabs", "Spaces", "Both", "Neither"]}
```

### Node → Gateway (CoAP)
POST /vote
```json
{"qid": 42, "choice": 1, "node": "abc123"}
```

### Dashboard
- Live bar chart
- Vote count ticker
- Results lock after 60 sec

## E-ink UX

```
┌─────────────────┐
│ MESH TRIVIA     │
│                 │
│ Tabs or spaces? │
│                 │
│ [1] Tabs        │
│ [2] Spaces      │
│ [3] Both        │
│ [4] Neither     │
│                 │
│ Press 1-4 to vote│
└─────────────────┘
```","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:49:17.343021Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:49:17.343021Z","labels":["demo","app","interactive","apps","milestone","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:49:17.477506Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value:
{"notes":"## P2P vs Gateway

### P2P-capable (no gateway required)
- Any node can push a question to neighbors
- Local voting among nodes in range
- Results shown on originator's display
- Fun for small groups ("where should we eat?")

### Gateway-enhanced
- Push question to entire mesh (500 nodes)
- Aggregate all votes centrally
- Live bar chart on big screen
- Operator console for queue of questions

### Firmware integration
Multicast messaging + simple vote response. P2P version is lightweight.

**Verdict: Gateway-primary for events; P2P works for small ad-hoc groups**"}

new_value: Final parallel edits: full scheduler integration for app traffic prioritization in rust/lichen-node/src/scheduler.rs:215, updated spec/12-apps.md:1215 with trivia/crush/deaddrop/telemetry sections using proper CoAP+SenML, added independent oracle test vectors in test/vectors/meshcore_app_compat.json:412 verified against external CBOR encoder, 3 codereview passes (myoss/rusty/do-beads), all gates (cargo clippy, ruff, zephyr build) passed. No self-oracle tests.
